model_type.description: Type of AI model to train

default: AI model training (LLMs, vision models, etc.)

description.default: Deploys and manages general-purpose compute workloads on Akash Network, the decentralized cloud. Specializes in AI/ML training, model inference APIs, sovereign agent hosting, and any Docker-based workload. Provides access to high-end NVIDIA GPUs at a fraction of cloud provider costs.

llm_consumable_description.default: I deploy and manage compute workloads on Akash Network's decentralized cloud. Tell me what you need to run (e.g., 'Train a Llama-2 model', 'Deploy a FastAPI service', 'Host a Stable Diffusion API') and I'll provision the resources, handle deployment, and provide access endpoints. Perfect for AI training, inference APIs, and hosting autonomous agents at 60-80% lower cost than traditional clouds.

message_id.description: AO message ID that created/updated this state

state_key.description: Specific state key to operate on

description.default: Manages permanent storage and state using Arweave (the permaweb) and AO (the hyper-parallel computer). Provides immutable audit logging, state management, and permanent data storage with cryptographic verification. Perfect for compliance, auditability, and building transparent autonomous systems.

default: All agent actions should be logged to Arweave for auditability
State should be checkpointed to AO for recoverability
NFT metadata must be stored on Arweave before minting

llm_consumable_description.default: I provide permanent storage and immutable audit logging using Arweave and AO. Tell me what you need to store or log (e.g., 'Log this transaction', 'Store agent state', 'Save NFT metadata permanently') and I'll handle encryption, verification, and permanent storage. All data is immutable, cryptographically signed, and guaranteed permanent for 200+ years. Perfect for compliance, auditability, and transparent autonomous systems.

content.description: Data content (JSON string for structured data)

encrypt.description: Whether to encrypt data before storage

permanent.description: Whether storage is permanent (always true for Arweave)

actor.description: Agent or user who triggered the event

permanent.description: Whether storage is permanent (always true for Arweave)

stored_on_arweave.description: Whether log was stored on Arweave

description.default: Executes decentralized finance operations using the ENSO intent-based execution engine. Handles token swaps, yield optimization, staking, cross-chain bridging, and complex DeFi strategies with automatic route optimization and minimal gas costs.

llm_consumable_description.default: I can execute any DeFi operation using natural language intents. Simply tell me what you want to do (e.g., 'Swap 10 ETH for USDC', 'Stake 100 USDC for highest yield', 'Bridge 50 USDC from Ethereum to Arbitrum') and I'll find the optimal route, minimize gas costs, and execute atomically. I support multi-step operations and can route across any supported chain.

amount.description: Amount to operate on (as string to preserve precision)

operation_type.description: The type of DeFi operation to perform

token_in.description: Token symbol or address to use as input (e.g., 'ETH', 'USDC')

token_out.description: For swaps: output token symbol or address

route_taken.description: The optimal route that was executed

block_number.description: Block number where transaction was mined

description.description: Text description of the 3D model to generate

next_cursor.description: Cursor for next page of results

permanent.description: Whether storage is permanent (always true for Arweave)

ipfs_hash.description: IPFS hash if stored on IPFS

scene_file_url.description: URL to 3D scene file (for rendering tasks)

ipfs_hash.description: IPFS hash if stored on IPFS

cost_per_second.description: Cost per second of render time

engine_used.description: Rendering engine that processed the job

partial_results.description: Partial results if job was cancelled

ipfs_hash.description: IPFS hash if stored on IPFS
IPFS hash if stored on IPFS

description.default: Executes 3D rendering, VFX, and generative AI tasks using Render Network's decentralized GPU infrastructure. Specializes in high-quality 3D model generation, image synthesis, video rendering, and complex visual effects processing.

llm_consumable_description.default: I can generate 3D models, images, and videos using AI and traditional rendering engines on Render Network's decentralized GPU infrastructure. Tell me what you want to create (e.g., 'Generate a 3D model of a futuristic car', 'Create a photorealistic image of a sunset over mountains', 'Render a Blender scene') and I'll handle the GPU compute, file management, and delivery. Perfect for NFT creation, game assets, product visualization, and creative content.

data_url.description: Direct URL to access stored data

permanent.description: Whether storage is permanent (always true for Arweave)

block_number.description: Block number where transaction was mined

lock_period.description: Lock period in days (0 for flexible)
Lock period in days (0 for flexible)

breakeven_time_days.description: Days until gas costs are covered by yield

gas_cost_estimate.description: Estimated gas cost for entering position

projected_returns.description: Projected returns over different time periods

lock_period.description: Lock period in days (0 for flexible)
Lock period in days (0 for flexible)
